overview: ReliefConnect is a multi-role emergency relief coordination platform connecting Citizens, NGOs, and Admins to streamline distribution of essential resources during emergencies. Features real-time tracking, interactive maps, multi-language support for all 20+ Indian languages, and now an AI assistant to help users navigate the app.
features: NGO request claiming and fulfillment tracking
Support for all 20+ official Indian languages
AI assistant panel for user guidance and queries
Full request lifecycle tracking (Open → Claimed → In Transit → Delivered)
